title: render() silently returns raw content when no renderer matches
body: GitHub::Markup.render() falls back to returning the unrendered content whenever renderer() finds no match, instead of raising, which hides real misconfiguration (like a missing converter gem) as if the file just had no markup.

title: markup_impl raises on re-registration, blocking test overrides
body: markup_impl() raises ArgumentError if the same symbol is registered twice, which makes it awkward for a test suite to stub out a renderer for a given markup type without monkeypatching internals.

title: CommandImplementation swallows stderr from external converters
body: lib/github/markup/command_implementation.rb shells out to converters like rst2html, but discards stderr entirely, so a broken converter installation just produces empty output with no clue what went wrong.

title: Document command lookup precedence for markups.rb entries
body: GitHub::Markup.command() checks File.dirname(__FILE__) + '/commands/#{command}' before falling back to PATH, but this precedence isn't documented anywhere for contributors adding new entries to markups.rb.
